# Full Preferred Codon Frequency Distribution
# Includes FIXED sites as Bin_0 (freq=0) and Bin_11 (freq=1)
# This creates the 'suspension bridge' pattern for visualization
# 
# Bin_0:  Fixed for NON-PREFERRED codon (pref_freq = 0)
# Bin_1-10: Polymorphic sites (pref_freq = 0.001-0.999)
# Bin_11: Fixed for PREFERRED codon (pref_freq = 1)
# 
Amino_Acid	Family	Bin_0_Fixed_NonPref	Bin_1_(0.0-0.1)	Bin_2_(0.1-0.2)	Bin_3_(0.2-0.3)	Bin_4_(0.3-0.4)	Bin_5_(0.4-0.5)	Bin_6_(0.5-0.6)	Bin_7_(0.6-0.7)	Bin_8_(0.7-0.8)	Bin_9_(0.8-0.9)	Bin_10_(0.9-1.0)	Bin_11_Fixed_Pref
A	4-fold	528887	16613	3401	2812	2496	2549	2772	2963	4069	5883	31064	117994
C	2-fold	81046	5988	1137	921	913	911	851	993	1263	1814	11174	88340
D	2-fold	332766	16594	3378	2737	2401	2536	2836	3065	4133	5977	33009	158455
E	2-fold	348653	14020	2558	2170	1909	2066	2381	2551	3466	5369	34360	261399
F	2-fold	199834	12280	2608	2045	1885	1994	2210	2428	3295	4746	28224	195211
G	4-fold	515962	17136	3417	2751	2382	2332	2614	2718	3611	5283	28045	113602
H	2-fold	114779	6810	1378	1148	1065	1161	1254	1349	1966	2896	16337	94497
I	3-fold	379609	13838	2915	2446	2213	2277	2348	2695	3596	5032	27437	138330
K	2-fold	309725	13176	2564	2187	1912	2036	2189	2458	3351	5006	31938	273027
L	6-fold	790002	15011	3241	2643	2299	2379	2502	2628	3599	5026	28403	144216
